headline: Raymond James and Guggenheim Stay Bullish on Alumis (ALMS) After Trial Results
summary: Alumis Inc. (NASDAQ:ALMS) is one of the 10 Best Performing Stocks of Q1 2026 to Watch for Q2. On March 30, Raymond James reaffirmed its Strong Buy rating on Alumis Inc. (NASDAQ:ALMS) with a price target of $46 after the company presented Phase 3 trial data at the American Academy of Dermatology meeting. Raymond James […]

headline: Jefferies Maintains Hold on Raymond James Finl, Lowers Price Target to $145
summary: Jefferies  analyst Gerald O'Hara   maintains Raymond James Finl (NYSE:RJF) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $165 to $145.
